items.titleZh: 代理评估差距：企业人工智能组织存在现实一致性问题，而不是覆盖范围问题——而且大多数都已投入生产
items.titleEn: The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway
items.summaryZh: VentureBeat AI 报告了人工智能领域的业务发展。消息来源的要点：在 157 家企业中，组织正在授予人工智能代理更多的自主权，同时信任旨在减少自主权的评估。
items.summaryEn: VentureBeat AI reports a business development in AI. Key point from the source: Across 157 enterprises, organizations are granting AI agents more autonomy while trusting the evaluations meant to gate that autonomy less.
items.overviewZh: VentureBeat AI 发布了关于“代理评估差距：企业人工智能组织存在现实一致性问题，而不是覆盖问题——而且大多数都已投入生产”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: VentureBeat AI published a new update about “The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway”.

items.titleZh: 前 DeepMind 研究员如何在推出产品之前筹集 3 亿美元的种子前估值
items.titleEn: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product

items.summaryEn: TechCrunch AI reports a business development in AI. Key point from the source: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai exp
items.overviewZh: TechCrunch AI 发布了有关“前 DeepMind 研究员如何在推出产品之前筹集 3 亿美元种子前估值”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: TechCrunch AI published a new update about “How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product”.

items.titleZh: 人工智能时代的记分卡
items.titleEn: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summaryZh: OpenAI 博客报道了人工智能的行业发展。来源要点：OpenAI 首席财务官 Sarah Friar 介绍了一种实用的 AI 记分卡，通过有用的工作、每项成功任务的成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量投资回报率。
items.summaryEn: OpenAI Blog reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
items.overviewZh: OpenAI 博客发布了有关“AI 时代的记分卡”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: OpenAI Blog published a new update about “A scorecard for the AI age”.

items.titleZh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin 最大限度地提高训练后工作负载的每美元的智能 — 这是代理 AI 的一个关键指标
items.titleEn: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
items.summaryZh: NVIDIA 博客报道了人工智能的行业发展。来源要点：极端协同设计中的每个代币成本最低，可以最大限度地提高代理时代后期培训的每美元的智能。
items.summaryEn: NVIDIA Blog reports an industry development in AI. Key point from the source: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.
items.overviewZh: NVIDIA 博客发布了有关“NVIDIA Vera Rubin 最大限度地提高训练后工作负载的每美元智能——代理 AI 的关键指标”的最新更新。
items.overviewEn: NVIDIA Blog published a new update about “NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI”.

items.titleZh: 克劳德 (Claude) 成为我们的人工智能产品副总裁。我们以 14 美元的价格将 Marketo 搬迁了 10 年。我们的代理在一小时内杀死了一款价值 1 万美元的应用程序：The Agents #010 - saastr.com
